summary: Iteration 36 - Testing bulk course creation, auto-sync salary, edit modal instructor dropdown, and year selector. ALL TESTS PASSED. 11/11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed for all new features.

bulk_course_creation.api_response: Returns {message, created, courses} with count and created courses
bulk_course_creation.ui_button: PASS - 'Planifier la semaine' button found on /courses page
bulk_course_creation.ui_modal: PASS - Modal opens with title 'Planifier la semaine — Mars 2026'
bulk_course_creation.pre_filled_rows: PASS - 3 pre-filled rows with default coach (Antoine Paucod)
bulk_course_creation.add_row_button: PASS - '+ Ajouter une ligne' button present
bulk_course_creation.trash_icons: PASS - Red trash icons for each row
bulk_course_creation.dynamic_counter: PASS - Counter updates dynamically ('1 cours à créer')
bulk_course_creation.submit_button: PASS - 'Créer X cours' button with dynamic count
bulk_course_creation.coach_dropdown: PASS - Antoine Paucod shown in coach dropdown

auto_sync_salary.auto_trigger: PASS - Frontend triggers salary generation after course update (updateMutation onSuccess)

edit_modal_instructor_dropdown.dropdown_shows_coaches: PASS - Shows Antoine Paucod (50 CHF/h), Coach Alex, Coach Julie, Coach Marc
edit_modal_instructor_dropdown.antoine_paucod_available: PASS - Antoine Paucod is available and selectable

year_selector.year_2026_in_dropdown: PASS - 2026 visible in year selector dropdown [2023, 2024, 2025, 2026]

salary_transactions.transaction_created: PASS - '[Auto] Salaire Antoine Paucod - 3h à 50.0 CHF/h' visible on /transactions

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create/delete TEST_ prefixed courses automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 36 features verified working: 1) Bulk course creation via 'Planifier la semaine' button opens modal with 3 pre-filled rows, add/remove row functionality, dynamic counter, and coach dropdown. POST /api/courses/bulk creates multiple courses. 2) Auto-sync salary: updateMutation.onSuccess triggers generate-salary-expenses API. 3) Edit modal instructor dropdown shows all coaches including Antoine Paucod (50 CHF/h). 4) Year selector includes 2026. Existing data: Mars 2026 has 4 courses with Antoine Paucod as coach, 1 salary transaction (150 CHF = 3h * 50 CHF/h).
